title: Note meme-ineligible access for trial agent

log.context: Note meme-ineligible access for trial agent

Noted. The requirement is:

- In `[show-trial]` mode, ineligible personas should be available for ALL roles (prosecutor, juror, advocate), not just as the defendant. The defendant bypass already exists; the same logic needs to apply to the other seats.
- In `[meme-congress]` mode, ineligible personas should also be selectable as regular debaters.

The agent working on trial_announce (a3ae3c385dd4d2f3b) should have this context. If it doesn't pick it up from the task, the fix will be needed in th...(truncated)
